messages.content: This is a basic HTML page with a header, main content section, and footer. The header contains a hero section with a title, subtitle, and call-to-action button. The main content includes four columns with images and descriptions about the app's features. The footer contains the copyright information for the app. The page also includes some basic styles for fonts, colors, and spacing using CSS.
rewite the code to remove all the image sources

Your Reliable Taxi Booking App

Get around town easily and quickly

Book Now

Easy Booking

Booking a ride with our app is a breeze. Just enter your pickup location and destination and we’ll take care of the rest.

Fast Response Time

We know your time is valuable. That’s why we provide fast response times so you can get to your destination quickly and on time.

24/7 Availability

Don’t wait until the morning to book a ride. We’re available 24/7 to get you where you need to go, no matter the time of day.

Flexible Payment Options

We offer a variety of payment options so you can choose the method that’s most convenient for you. Pay with cash, card or other payment options and never miss a ride.

© 2021 Taxi Booking App
